description: Hyperparameter sweep configurations for HAMT tuning
note: Run these if the default config shows marginal energy advantage

lambda_energy.purpose: Find the energy penalty sweet spot

lambda_habituation.purpose: Find the habituation reward sweet spot

hidden_size.purpose: Test where HAMT advantage is largest (expect larger gain at higher spike rates)

history_length.purpose: How much temporal context for novelty detection

aggressive_hamt.purpose: Push HAMT hard to see maximum possible energy reduction
